ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "CRIM" REAL /* Per capita crime rate by town */,
  "ZN" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq.ft. */,
  "CHAS" REAL /* Charles River dummy variable (= 1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "NOX" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "RM" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "AGE" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "DIS" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "RAD" REAL /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "TAX" REAL /* Full-value property-tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "PTRATIO" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "B" REAL /* Proportion of blacks by town */,
  "LSTAT" REAL /* Lower status of the population */,
  "MEDV" REAL /* Median house prices in $1000's */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, etc.) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a garage */,
  "basement" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a basement */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who listed the property */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES environmental_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_listing_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the residents in the location */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "NOX_level" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide level */,
  "RAD_index" REAL /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "DIS_distance" REAL /* Weighted distance to employment centers */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "water_quality_index" INTEGER /* Water quality index */,
  "presence_of_parks" INTEGER /* Indicates if there are parks nearby */,
  "presence_of_schools" INTEGER /* Indicates if there are schools nearby */,
  "presence_of_hospitals" INTEGER /* Indicates if there are hospitals nearby */,
  "presence_of_grocery_stores" INTEGER /* Indicates if there are grocery stores nearby */,
  "presence_of_public_transport" INTEGER /* Indicates if there are public transport options nearby */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the agent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the agent's company */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the seller */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the seller is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the seller is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, guest) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the user has access to */,
  "access_granted_on" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
